data.title: RED test: Assert CLAUDE.md contains CLI_user tag application guidance
data.description:
## TDD Requirement (RED phase)

Create a new metadata validation test that FAILS before the CLAUDE.md update.

Create: `tests/scripts/test-claude-md-cli-user-guidance.sh`

The test should:
1. Check that CLAUDE.md contains guidance that when a user explicitly requests a bug ticket, the agent includes --tags CLI_user in the command
2. Check that CLAUDE.md also states that autonomously-discovered bugs must NOT use CLI_user

This test FAILS before the implementation task because CLAUDE.md does not yet contain CLI_user tag application guidance.

Note: `test-claude-md-cli-user-guidance.sh` normalizes to `testclaudemdcliuserguidancesh` which contains `claudemd` — fuzzy match works for CLAUDE.md ✓

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] `tests/scripts/test-claude-md-cli-user-guidance.sh` exists and is executable
  Verify: test -x $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-claude-md-cli-user-guidance.sh
- [ ] Test currently fails (RED) against unmodified CLAUDE.md
  Verify: Confirmed by inspection — CLAUDE.md has no CLI_user guidance yet
- [ ] `bash tests/run-all.sh` suite does not crash (test failure is expected, suite continues)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && bash tests/run-all.sh 2>&1 | tail -5
